scripts.build: npx tsc && shx cp src/dashboard/dashboard.html public/dashboard.html && shx cp src/dashboard/dashboard.css public/dashboard.css && shx cp src/dashboard/dashboard-client.js public/dashboard-client.js && shx mkdir -p public/assets && shx cp src/dashboard/assets/banner.svg public/assets/banner.svg && shx cp src/dashboard/assets/favicon.svg public/assets/favicon.svg
scripts.start: concurrently -n DNS,LB,WORKER,DASHBOARD -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run start:dns" "npm run start:lb" "npm run start:worker" "npm run start:dashboard"
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n DNS,LB,WORKER,DASHBOARD -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run start:dns" "npm run start:lb" "npm run start:worker" "npm run start:dashboard"
scripts.start:core: concurrently -n DNS,LB,DASHBOARD -c blue,green,magenta "npm run start:dns" "npm run start:lb" "npm run start:dashboard"
scripts.start:cluster: concurrently -n DNS,LB,WORKER1,WORKER2,WORKER3,DASHBOARD -c blue,green,yellow,cyan,white,magenta "npm run start:dns" "npm run start:lb" "npm run start:worker" "npm run start:worker" "npm run start:worker" "npm run start:dashboard"
